title: Global right drawer host and browser bridge
goal: Add a shared right drawer container and a browser API that can execute safe panel open commands.
requirements: Add one global drawer host to base.html with stable overlay, panel and content ids.
Load command.htmx_url into the configured target through HTMX or a safe fetch+swap fallback.
Do not execute arbitrary script from command payload.
After successful content load, open the drawer and refresh LocalBusinessPageContext.
Keep existing module open/close functions working or wrap them over the new API.
Keep AI chat page layout usable with the global drawer.
acceptance: The global drawer can open and close on a blank/non-module page.
Kanban and waiting-list pages still open panels by user click.
Page context refresh runs after panel open and close.
